Class GRPCLinearAlgebraBackend<E>

java.lang.Object
org.episteme.client.client.mathematics.linearalgebra.backends.GRPCLinearAlgebraBackend<E>
Type Parameters:
E - The element type (typically Real for network transfer)
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable, LinearAlgebraBackend<E>, LinearAlgebraProvider<E>, SparseLinearAlgebraProvider<E>, AlgorithmProvider, Backend, ComputeBackend
@AutoService({LinearAlgebraBackend.class,LinearAlgebraProvider.class,SparseLinearAlgebraProvider.class,ComputeBackend.class,Backend.class}) public class GRPCLinearAlgebraBackend<E> extends Object implements SparseLinearAlgebraProvider<E>, LinearAlgebraBackend<E>
A LinearAlgebraProvider that offloads operations to a remote gRPC service.

This provider enables distributed computing by delegating matrix and vector operations to a remote server. Useful for:

  • Offloading heavy computations to powerful servers
  • Utilizing GPU clusters remotely
  • Collaborative scientific computing

Since:
1.0
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)

    Constructor
    Description
    GRPCLinearAlgebraBackend()
    Public no-arg constructor required by ServiceLoader.
    GRPCLinearAlgebraBackend(String host, int port, Field<E> field)
    Creates a gRPC provider connected to the specified server.

    Returns the type of hardware accelerator used by this backend.

    Returns a description of the backend.
    String
    getId()
    Returns the unique identifier for this backend (e.g., "javafx", "jmol", "cuda").
    String
    getName()
    Returns the display name for UI presentation.
    int
    getPriority()
    Priority of this provider (higher means more preferred).
    String
    getType()
    Returns the backend type category (e.g., "plotting", "molecular", "tensor", "math").

    gmres(Matrix<E> a, Vector<E> b, Vector<E> x0, E tolerance, int maxIterations, int restart)

  • Constructor Details

    • GRPCLinearAlgebraBackend

      public GRPCLinearAlgebraBackend()
      Public no-arg constructor required by ServiceLoader. Defaults to localhost:50051.

    • GRPCLinearAlgebraBackend

      public GRPCLinearAlgebraBackend(String host, int port, Field<E> field)
      Creates a gRPC provider connected to the specified server.
      Parameters:
      host - Server hostname or IP
      port - Server port
      field - The field for element operations

    • createContext

      public ExecutionContext createContext()
      Description copied from interface: ComputeBackend
      Creates an execution context for running operations.

      The context should be used within a try-with-resources block to ensure proper cleanup of resources.

      Specified by:
      createContext in interface ComputeBackend
      Returns:
      new execution context

    • solveTriangular

      public Vector<E> solveTriangular(Matrix<E> A, Vector<E> b, boolean upper, boolean transpose, boolean conjugate, boolean unit)
      Description copied from interface: LinearAlgebraProvider
      Solves the triangular system Ax = b.
      Specified by:
      solveTriangular in interface LinearAlgebraProvider<E>
      Parameters:
      A - the triangular matrix
      b - the right-hand side vector
      upper - true if A is upper triangular, false if lower
      transpose - true if solving A^T x = b
      conjugate - true if solving A^H x = b (only if transpose is true and complex)
      unit - true if A is unit triangular (diagonal is all ones)

    • add

      public Vector<E> add(Vector<E> a, Vector<E> b)
